scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (extensions, call_log, messages, contacts, devices); legacy ships no writes (capabilities.write is false) and the full RingCentral surface (SMS/fax send, call control, meeting/webinar management, presence, subscriptions/webhooks) is out of scope until Pass B.

excluded.reason: legacy connector never implemented SMS sending; Pass B capability expansion
legacy connector never implemented fax sending; Pass B capability expansion
legacy connector never implemented call control; Pass B capability expansion
webhook/event subscription management not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
legacy connector never implemented presence updates; Pass B capability expansion
single-extension self-profile introspection, not a syncable object stream
